name: L
description: Drum horizontal length or vertical height

name: D
description: Drum diameter

name: LD
description: Drum length to diameter ratio

name: P
description: Drum pressure (minimum of inlet pressures)

name: T
description: Drum temperature (equilibrium)

name: Tv
description: Drum vapor holdup temperature

name: Tl
description: Drum liquid holdup temperature

name: Duty
description: Drum duty (equilibrium). This the net duty excluding external duties connected to the Heat ports.\n     Positive value represents heat duty added to the fluid.\n     Negative value represents heat duty removed from the fluid.

name: DutyV
description: Drum duty to non-equilibrium vapor holdup.\n     Positive value represents heat duty added to the vapor holdup.\n     Negative value represents heat duty removed from the vapor holdup.

name: DutyL
description: Drum duty to non-equilibrium liquid holdup.\n     Positive value represents heat duty added to the liquid holdup.\n     Negative value represents heat duty removed from the liquid holdup.

name: HeatDuty
description: Drum heat duty. This is the duty connected to the Heat ports.

name: VF
description: Drum feed molar vaporization (bubble=0, dew=1)

name: Level
description: Drum liquid level fraction value (including heads)

name: LHeight
description: Drum liquid level height value (above bottom tangent for vertical drum)

name: tau
description: Drum liquid residence time

name: V
description: Drum volume

name: Mm
description: Drum metal mass for heat transfer

name: thk
description: Drum wall thickness for heat transfer

name: rhom
description: Drum metal mass density for heat transfer

name: Vl
description: Drum liquid volume

name: VFrev[S14]
description: Drum feed stream reverse fluid phase specification (Default 1 is for vapor return, update to 0 for liquid return)

name: DutymV
description: Drum duty loss from vapor to metal wall for non equilibrium.\n     Positive value represents heat loss to the metal wall.\n     Negative value represents heat gain from the metal wall

name: DutymL
description: Drum equilibrium duty loss to metal wall or liquid duty loss to metal wall for non equilibrium.\n     Positive value represents heat loss to the metal wall.\n     Negative value represents heat gain from the metal wall

name: LDE_In[S14]
description: Drum difference between geometric length and inlet port elevation change\n (L - DE_In) in case of vertical orientation\n (D - DE_In) in case of horizontal and spherical orientations.

name: MaxLDE_In
description: Drum maximum difference between geometric length and inlet port elevation change

name: MinLDE_In
description: Drum minimum difference between geometric length and inlet port elevation change

name: VFu
description: Drum molar vapor fraction\nVLE: unbounded VFu where VFu < 0 is subcooled, VFu = 0 is the bubble point, VFu = 1 is the dew point, and VFu > 1 is superheated\nVLLE: bounded VF (0 ≤ VF ≤ 1) where VF = 0 is the bubble point (or subcooled) and VF = 1 is the dew point (or superheated)
